flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Oklahoma Panhandle State University fell 41% between 2021 and 2024 (28.9% → 17.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Oklahoma Panhandle State University fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (26.5% → 20.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Oklahoma Panhandle State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Oklahoma Panhandle State University rose 51% between 2021 and 2024 (37.1% → 55.9%).
